<includeonly>{{#switch:{{lc:{{{1|}}}}}
|cacti club = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|types=[[Primitive]], [[Heavy]]
	|damage={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=10(80%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})
		|2|rare=20(85%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})
		|3|epic=30(90%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})
		|4|legendary=50(100%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})
		|#default=-}}
	|attackspeed={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=1.66s
		|2|rare=1.58s
		|3|epic=1.51s
		|4|legendary=1.36s
		|#default=-}}
	|dps={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=6.0(48%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})/s
		|2|rare=12.7(54%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})/s
		|3|epic=19.9(60%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})/s
		|4|legendary=36.8(74%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})/s
		|#default=-}}
	|crit={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=x2 (3%)
		|2|rare=x2 (3%)
		|3|epic=x2 (3%)
		|4|legendary=x2 (3%)
		|#default=-}}
	|range={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=200
		|2|rare=200
		|3|epic=200
		|4|legendary=200
		|#default=-}}
	|knockback={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=8
		|2|rare=8
		|3|epic=8
		|4|legendary=8
		|#default=-}}
	|lifesteal={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=0
		|2|rare=0
		|3|epic=0
		|4|legendary=0
		|#default=-}}
	|price={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=20
		|2|rare=39
		|3|epic=74
		|4|legendary=149
		|#default=-}}
	|special=Hitting an enemy spawns {{Color|tier1|3}}/{{Color|tier2|4}}/{{Color|tier3|5}}/{{Color|tier4|6}} projectiles dealing {{Color|tier1|50%}}/{{Color|tier2|60%}}/{{Color|tier3|70%}}/{{Color|tier4|80%}}{{StatIcon|RangedDamage}} damage
	|unlockedby=Default
	|attacktype=Sweep
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|chopper = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|types=[[Blade]]
	|damage={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=6(50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}}15%{{StatIcon|Max HP}})
		|2|rare=12(50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}}20%{{StatIcon|Max HP}})
		|3|epic=18(50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}}25%{{StatIcon|Max HP}})
		|4|legendary=30(50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}}30%{{StatIcon|Max HP}})
		|#default=-}}
	|attackspeed={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=0.99s
		|2|rare=0.99s
		|3|epic=0.96s
		|4|legendary=0.89s
		|#default=-}}
	|dps={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=6.1(51%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}}15%{{StatIcon|Max HP}})/s
		|2|rare=12.2(51%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}}20%{{StatIcon|Max HP}})/s
		|3|epic=18.8(52%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}}26%{{StatIcon|Max HP}})/s
		|4|legendary=33.7(56%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}}34%{{StatIcon|Max HP}})/s
		|#default=-}}
	|crit={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=x2 (10%)
		|2|rare=x2 (15%)
		|3|epic=x2 (20%)
		|4|legendary=x2 (25%)
		|#default=-}}
	|range={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=135
		|2|rare=150
		|3|epic=165
		|4|legendary=180
		|#default=-}}
	|knockback={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}

		|2|rare=2
		|3|epic=2
		|4|legendary=2
		|#default=-}}
	|lifesteal={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=0
		|2|rare=0
		|3|epic=0
		|4|legendary=0
		|#default=-}}
	|price={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=15
		|2|rare=31
		|3|epic=61
		|4|legendary=122
		|#default=-}}
	|special={{Color|tier1|+1}}/{{Color|tier2|+1}}/{{Color|tier3|+1}}/{{Color|tier4|+2}} health healed from consumables
	|unlockedby=Win a run with [[File:Multitasker.png|link=Multitasker|x30px]] [[Multitasker]]
	|attacktype=Sweep
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}

|claw = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|types=[[Unarmed]], [[Precise]]
	|damage={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=5(15%{{StatIcon|AttackSpeed}}50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})
		|2|rare=10(20%{{StatIcon|AttackSpeed}}50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})

		|#default=-}}

	|unlockedby=Default
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}

}}
|quarterstaff = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|types=[[Primitive]], [[Medieval]]
	|damage={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}

	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}

	|special=Hitting an enemy spawns a lightning projectile flying towards another random enemy that bounces {{Color|tier1|-}}/{{Color|tier2|1}}/{{Color|tier3|2}}/{{Color|tier4|3}} times and inflicts {{Color|tier1|5}}/{{Color|tier2|6}}/{{Color|tier3|8}}/{{Color|tier4|11}} + (80%{{StatIcon|ElementalDamage}}) damage
	|unlockedby=Default
	|attacktype=Thrust
	|isdlc=-

}}

|thief dagger = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=1
	|types=[[Precise]]
	|damage={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=6(50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})
		|2|rare=12(50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})
		|3|epic=18(50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})
		|4|legendary=30(50%{{StatIcon|MeleeDamage}})

	|special=+1 [[Max HP]] for every {{Color|tier1|20}}/{{Color|tier2|18}}/{{Color|tier3|16}}/{{Color|tier4|12}} kills in a wave with this weapon
	|unlockedby=Default
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}

	|rarity=1

|captain's sword

	|special=Alternates between thrusting and sweeping attacks<br>Deals {{Color|tier3|+25}}/{{Color|tier4|+50}} Damage for every free weapon slot you have.
	|unlockedby=Win a run with Captain
	|attacktype=Alternates between thrusting and sweeping attacks
	|isdlc=1
	|#default=-
}}
|chainsaw = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|types=[[Blade]], [[Tool]]

	|attacktype=Thrust
	|isdlc=1
	|#default=-
}}

		|#default=-}}
	|dps={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=3.1(38.1%{{StatIcon|Melee Damage}}7.6%{{StatIcon|Luck}})/s
		|2|rare=6.4(39.9%{{StatIcon|Melee Damage}}12%{{StatIcon|Luck}})/s
		|3|epic=10(41.7%{{StatIcon|Melee Damage}}16.7%{{StatIcon|Luck}})/s
		|4|legendary=14(43.8%{{StatIcon|Melee Damage}}21.9%{{StatIcon|Luck}})/s
		|#default=-}}
	|crit={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=x1.5 (3% chance)
		|2|rare=x1.5 (3% chance)
		|3|epic=x1.5 (3% chance)
		|4|legendary=x1.5 (3% chance)
		|#default=-}}
	|range={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=150
		|2|rare=175
		|3|epic=200
		|4|legendary=225
		|#default=-}}
	|knockback={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=2
		|2|rare=2
		|3|epic=2
		|4|legendary=2
		|#default=-}}
	|lifesteal={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=0
		|2|rare=0
		|3|epic=0
		|4|legendary=0
		|#default=-}}
	|price={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=15
		|2|rare=31
		|3|epic=61
		|4|legendary=122
		|#default=-}}
	|special=Enemies hit take {{Color|green|10%}} more damage for {{Color|green|3}} seconds (max: {{Color|tier1|30%}}/{{Color|tier2|50%}}/{{Color|tier3|70%}}/{{Color|tier4|100%}})
	|unlockedby=Default
	|attacktype=Sweep
	|isdlc=1
	|#default=-
}}

	|special=Deals {{Color|tier3|8x8}}/{{Color|tier4|10x10}} ({{Color|green|+100%{{StatIcon|Elemental Damage}}}}) burning damage<br>Slows enemies by {{Color|tier3|1%}}/{{Color|tier4|2%}} on hit for every {{Color|green|1}} {{Color|green|Engineering}} you have [0%]. <br> Pierces through enemies. <br> Can't bounce
	|unlockedby=Win a run with Technomage
	|attacktype=-
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}

	|rarity=1
	|types=[[Primitive]], [[Precise]]
	|damage={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}

	|attacktype=Thrust
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}

	|special=Alternates between thrusting and sweeping attacks<br>-/{{Color|tier2|1%}}/{{Color|tier3|2%}}/{{Color|tier4|3%}} chance to one shot the target when hitting it
	|unlockedby=Reach 100% Crit Chance
	|attacktype=Thrust
	|isdlc=-
	|#default=-
}}
|war hammer = {{#switch:{{lc:{{{2|}}}}}
	|rarity=3
	|types=[[Blunt]], [[Heavy]]
	|damage={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=-
		|2|rare=-
		|3|epic=100(+150%{{StatIcon|Melee Damage}}+100%{{StatIcon|Engineering}})
		|4|legendary=180(+200%{{StatIcon|Melee Damage}}+150%{{StatIcon|Engineering}})
		|#default=-}}
	|attackspeed={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=-
		|2|rare=-
		|3|epic=2.11s
		|4|legendary=1.95s
		|#default=-}}
	|dps={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=--
		|2|rare=--
		|3|epic=47.3(70.9%{{StatIcon|Melee Damage}}47.3%{{StatIcon|Engineering}})/s
		|4|legendary=92.4(102.7%{{StatIcon|Melee Damage}}77%{{StatIcon|Engineering}})/s
		|#default=-}}
	|crit={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=-
		|2|rare=-
		|3|epic=x1.5 (3% chance)
		|4|legendary=x1.5 (3% chance)
		|#default=-}}
	|range={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=-
		|2|rare=-
		|3|epic=200
		|4|legendary=200
		|#default=-}}
	|knockback={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=-
		|2|rare=-
		|3|epic=20
		|4|legendary=25
		|#default=-}}
	|lifesteal={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=-
		|2|rare=-
		|3|epic=0
		|4|legendary=0
		|#default=-}}
	|price={{#switch:{{lc:{{{3|}}}}}
		|1|common=-
		|2|rare=-
		|3|epic=130
		|4|legendary=255
		|#default=-}}
	|special=Resets the cooldown of all offensive turrets when attacking
	|unlockedby=Win a run with Dwarf
	|attacktype=Sweep
	|isdlc=1
	|#default=-
}}
|#default=Weapon name not found}}</includeonly><noinclude>
Database for all [[Weapons|Weapon]] stats. Use the template to get data for the specified [[Weapons|Weapon]].

==Usage==
<pre>
{{Weapon Data
|any weapon name
|rarity/types/damage/attackspeed/dps/crit/range/knockback/lifesteal/special/price/unlockedby/isdlc
|common/rare/epic/legendary/1/2/3/4
}}
</pre>

==Examples==
{| class="wikitable"
!Data
!Code
!Preview
!Alias
|-
|Class
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|type|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|types|common}}
|
|-
|Damage Tier 1
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|1}}
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|common}}</nowiki></code>
|-
|Damage Tier 2
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|2}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|2}}
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|rare}}</nowiki></code>
|-
|Damage Tier 3
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|3}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|3}}
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|epic}}</nowiki></code>
|-
|Damage Tier 4
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|4}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|4}}
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|damage|legendary}}</nowiki></code>
|-
|Attack Speed
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|attackspeed|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|attackspeed|common}}
|
|-
|DPS
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|dps|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|dps|common}}
|
|-
|Crit
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|crit|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|crit|common}}
|
|-
|Range
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|range|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|range|common}}
|
|-
|Knockback
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|knockback|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|knockback|common}}
|
|-
|Life Steal
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|lifesteal|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|lifesteal|common}}
|
|-
|Special Effects
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|special|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|special|common}}
|
|-
|Price
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|price|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|price|common}}
|
|-
|Unlocked By
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|unlockedby|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|unlockedby|common}}
|
|-
|Attack Type
|<code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Hand|attacktype|1}}</nowiki></code>
|{{Weapon Data|Hand|attacktype|1}}
|
|}

===Error===

* <code><nowiki>{{Weapon Data|Invalid name|damage|common}}</nowiki></code> = {{Weapon Data|Acid|damage|common}}

===Tier Colors===

Wrap the template in [[Template:Color]] to show tier colors:

* <code><nowiki>{{Color|tier1|{{Weapon Data|Wrench|damage|1}}}}</nowiki></code> = {{Color|tier1|{{Weapon Data|Wrench|damage|1}}}}
* <code><nowiki>{{Color|tier2|{{Weapon Data|Wrench|damage|2}}}}</nowiki></code> = {{Color|tier2|{{Weapon Data|Wrench|damage|2}}}}
* <code><nowiki>{{Color|tier3|{{Weapon Data|Wrench|damage|3}}}}</nowiki></code> = {{Color|tier3|{{Weapon Data|Wrench|damage|3}}}}
* <code><nowiki>{{Color|tier4|{{Weapon Data|Wrench|damage|4}}}}</nowiki></code> = {{Color|tier4|{{Weapon Data|Wrench|damage|4}}}}

<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Name",
			"description": "As shown on the Weapons page",
			"example": "Cacti Club",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true,
			"suggested": true
		},
		"2": {
			"label": "Data",
			"description": "Options: rarity, types, damage, attackspeed, dps, crit, range, knockback, lifesteal, special, price, unlockedby",
			"example": "attackspeed",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true,
			"suggested": true
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "Tier",
			"description": "Options: 1, 2, 3, 4",
			"example": "1",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true,
			"suggested": true
		}
	}
}
</templatedata></noinclude>
